name: @chbrain/khai-engine-meaning
description: khai engine content, the meaning domain: meaning in life as position -- the stance a persona holds toward the question of whether their life matters.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Meaning in life as position: the stance a persona holds toward whether their life matters -- present, searching, adrift, or renewed.

card.wire: Attaches at Position. The anchor (position_meaning.md) declares meaning in life: the stance a persona holds toward the question of whether their life matters.
card.issue: Four expressions a persona may hold: present (the sense of mattering is already there; the persona acts from a known centre), searching (meaning is absent and actively sought; the question is open), adrift (meaning is absent and not sought; the persona moves by inertia or distraction), and renewed (meaning was lost and has been rebuilt; the centre holds but is known to be held). The expressions map the four combinations of presence and search, moving between them under pressure.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the expression it holds.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real meaning expression. Whether the expression is true to the persona's history is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give each persona its stance under Projection. Read it in how the persona orients to what the scene offers -- not in what they say about purpose.
